description: It's all about dressing sporty, and what better way to do it with ease than with this bag from adidas.Height: 44cmWidth: 19cmDepth: 32cmMade of 100% polyester with a nylon liningOne main zippered compartment with a laptop pouchMesh organizer pouch and mobile pouch in the main compartment A zippered compartment on the frontSynthetic haul loop for handling easeBranded zippersMesh pockets on one sides for carrying a sipper Padded back for carrying easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
